negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for brown_swiss_negative
% SZS output start Proof for brown_swiss_negative
1. ! [X0] : (is_brown_swiss_cattle(X0) => is_cow(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (is_cow(X0) => is_domesticated(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (is_alligator(X0) => ~is_domesticated(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. is_alligator(ted) [input(axiom)]
6. ~(is_pet(ted) & is_brown_swiss_cattle(ted)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~~(is_pet(ted) & is_brown_swiss_cattle(ted)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. is_pet(ted) & is_brown_swiss_cattle(ted) [flattening 7]
10. is_brown_swiss_cattle(ted) [pure predicate removal 8]
11. ! [X0] : (is_cow(X0) | ~is_brown_swiss_cattle(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
12. ! [X0] : (is_domesticated(X0) | ~is_cow(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
13. ! [X0] : (~is_domesticated(X0) | ~is_alligator(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
16. ~is_brown_swiss_cattle(X0) | is_cow(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
18. ~is_cow(X0) | is_domesticated(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. ~is_alligator(X0) | ~is_domesticated(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. is_alligator(ted) [cnf transformation 5]
21. is_brown_swiss_cattle(ted) [cnf transformation 10]
22. is_cow(ted) [resolution 16,21]
24. is_domesticated(ted) [resolution 18,22]
25. ~is_domesticated(ted) [resolution 19,20]
26. $false [forward subsumption resolution 25,24]
% SZS output end Proof for brown_swiss_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
